featured.title: Electric Mobility Can Save Kenya From Pain of Rising Fuel Prices
featured.summary: In her recent opinion piece published in The Standard newspaper, Edna explores why accelerating electric mobility is one of Kenya’s strongest opportunities to build economic resilience, reduce fuel dependence, and leverage our renewable energy advantage.

items.title: Our Research Director attends the Nordic-Africa EV Summit in Oslo, Norway.
items.summary: The Nordic-Africa EV Summit is a high-level, twin-city platform connecting Africa's electric mobility transition with Nordic leadership in transport, energy systems, and battery storage.

items.title: New Research Fellowship Launched: Informal Transit & Urban Equity
items.summary: Applications are open for a two-year funded fellowship examining how formalisation of informal transit affects mobility equity in East African cities.

items.title: Transport Futures Presents Evidence to AUDA-NEPAD Infrastructure Working Group
items.summary: Written and oral evidence on continental rail connectivity submitted to AUDA-NEPAD's transport infrastructure working group in Addis Ababa.

items.title: Our Think Tank (formerly Africa Transport Research Hub later Transport Futures) has been featured in Agora's initial stocktake of think tanks, NGOs and academic institutions from across the continent
items.summary:
Joining knowledge forces for sustainable transport policies in Africa
